SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractCheckoutContractTest
Abstract JUnit 5 contract for checkout strategy implementations.
CheckoutCalculator
Combines discount and shipping strategies to calculate the final checkout total.
CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates discount and shipping strategies used by the checkout contract tests.
CheckoutContext
Immutable checkout input that is passed to pricing and shipping strategies.
CustomerProfile
Immutable customer information used by checkout rules.
DiscountStrategy
Calculates a discount for the current checkout context.
OrderItem
Immutable line item used during checkout.
PriceBreakdown
Immutable calculation result for a completed checkout.
ShippingStrategy
Calculates shipping cost for the current checkout context.
